identity.name: Sage Greenwood
identity.otherProficiencies: light/medium armor (non-metal), shields (non-metal), clubs, daggers, darts, javelins, maces, quarterstaves, scimitars, sickles, slings, spears, herbalism kit

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.desc: club/staff: atk + dmg use WIS, dmg becomes 1d8, magical, 1 min

spells.name: Guidance
spells.desc: touch ally adds 1d4 to one ability check w/in 1 min

spells.name: Thorn Whip
spells.desc: 30 ft, 2d6 piercing, pull Large or smaller 10 ft

spells.name: Entangle
spells.desc: 20 ft sq, STR save or restrained, 1 min

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.desc: 20 ft cube, DEX save or outlined: adv on atks vs target, no invis, 1 min

spells.name: Moonbeam
spells.desc: 5 ft beam, 2d10 radiant on enter/turn, CON save half, move 60 ft as action, 1 min

spells.name: Wither and Bloom
spells.desc: 10 ft sphere, 2d6 necrotic CON save half; one ally spends + rolls hit die to heal

spells.name: Locate Object
spells.desc: sense direction to known object w/in 1000 ft, 10 min

spells.name: Revivify
spells.desc: return creature dead <1 min to 1 HP (300 gp diamond)

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.desc: 100 ft radius difficult terrain, or 8 hr ritual enriches 0.5 mile

limitedSpells.name: Cure Wounds
limitedSpells.desc: 1/day free cast from magic weed pipe

racialTraits.name: Darkvision 60
racialTraits.desc: see dim as bright, dark as dim (greyscale)

racialTraits.name: Fey Ancestry
racialTraits.desc: adv vs charm, immune magical sleep

features.name: Druidic
features.desc: secret druid tongue, leave hidden messages only druids notice

features.name: Wild Shape
features.desc: BA: transform into beast CR ≤ 1/2 (no fly until lvl 8), 2.5 hr, HP = beast

features.name: Druid Circle
features.desc: subclass not yet chosen (Land or Moon expected at lvl 2). Confirm to unlock circle features

defaultInventory.name: Golden dog whistle
defaultInventory.notes: homebrew, all who hear in 30 ft DC 16 CON save or stunned 2 rounds

defaultInventory.name: Magic weed pipe
defaultInventory.notes: homebrew, druidic focus, 1/day free Cure Wounds

defaultInventory.name: Explorer's Pack
defaultInventory.notes: backpack, bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, 10 torches, 10 days rations, waterskin, 50 ft hemp rope
